title: LogEntry
description: Schema for LogEntry in Nuix ECC REST API

scope.description: defines the scope of the entry, either `Client` or `Server`

severity.description: Log entry severity, one of `Error`, `Warning`, `Info`, or `Debug`

jobId.description: id of the job the log entry is associated with

userId.description: id of the ECC user logged in when the log entry was created

date.description: date and time of the log entry

computerId.description: UUID of the computer on which the event occurred
